executives.name: Craig Arnold
executives.background: Craig Arnold is Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of Eaton. He was appointed Chairman and CEO on June 1, 2016. Previously, he served as President and Chief Operating Officer of Eaton and as Vice Chairman and Chief Operating Officer of the Industrial Sector. He joined Eaton in 2000 as Senior Vice President and Group Executive of the Fluid Power Group. Prior to Eaton, he held various leadership positions at General Electric.

executives.name: Geoffrey Martha
executives.background: Chairman and CEO of Medtronic plc. Director since 2023.

executives.name: Omar Ishrak
executives.background: Dr. Omar Ishrak has been a director since 2017 and served as Chairman from 2020 to 2023. He was Chairman and CEO of Medtronic plc from 2011 to 2020.

tenure_dates.title: CEO and Chairman of the Board

executives.name: Scott Donnelly
executives.background: Mr. Donnelly has served as Chairman of the Board since September 2010 and as President and Chief Executive Officer since December 2009. He previously served as President and Chief Operating Officer from June 2008 to December 2009. Prior to joining Textron, he was President and CEO of GE Aviation.
